title: calycobolus campanulatus subsp. oddonii
intro: Calycobolus campanulatus subsp. oddonii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as morning glory. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Calycobolus campanulatus subsp. oddonii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Calycobolus campanulatus subsp. oddonii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
